name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the shortening and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract (if using).
4. Sift together the flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing until just combined.
6. Chill the dough for 1-2 hours.
7. Roll the chilled dough into small balls (about 1 inch in diameter).
8. Roll each ball in a mixture of 3 tablespoons sugar and 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon until evenly coated.
9. Place the spiced cookie balls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Bake for 6 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
11. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them.
